_note: Corporate milestones rendered as a vertical timeline. Entries display top-to-bottom in the order listed.

milestones.title: Strengthening Development-Ready Capabilities
milestones.body: SQA expands its role beyond contracting — building dedicated development-ready capabilities to support landowners, investors, and industrial occupiers through joint ventures, build-to-suit projects, and forward-funded structures.

milestones.title: Growth into Turnkey and Design-Build Solutions
milestones.body: Continued growth of SQA's integrated Design & Build offering — combining in-house design, engineering coordination, MEP, and construction under a single accountable contract for industrial and commercial clients.

milestones.title: Achieved CIDB Grade G7
milestones.body: SQA Builders is upgraded to CIDB Grade G7 — the highest Malaysian contractor grade — qualifying the firm for construction works of unlimited value in both public and private sectors.

milestones.title: Major Factories, Warehouses, Offices & Institutional Projects
milestones.body: Delivery of large-scale industrial and institutional projects across the Klang Valley and northern corridor — including production plants, regional warehouses, corporate offices, and educational facilities.

milestones.title: Expansion into Industrial & Commercial Construction
milestones.body: SQA broadens its sector exposure — taking on larger industrial mandates including factories, warehouses, and showroom developments for Malaysian and Japanese corporate clients.

milestones.title: Establishment of SQA Group
milestones.body: The SQA Group is founded — anchored on three principles: Speed, Quality, and Assurance. From the outset, the Group positions itself as a Malaysian-Japanese contractor combining Japanese discipline with local construction expertise.
